name: BroadVision Dynamic Web Applications Enhance Employees, Clinch Customers, and Pamper Partners
description: Aberdeen Group's Product Viewpoint (Volume 10, Number 11, July 7, 1997) evaluates BroadVision's One-to-One Application System as a high-end dynamic Web application platform for corporate relationship management. Aberdeen defines a three-tier hierarchy of dynamic web servers (low-end CGI, mid-range ODBC, high-end CORBA-based object-oriented) and positions One-to-One as the industry leader in the high-end tier for personalized content delivery across Internet, intranet, and extranet channels. The study profiles One-to-One's capabilities for customer management, employee knowledge management, and partner/supplier extranets, citing customers including Liberty Financial, Banco Santander, USWest, and Kodak Picture Network.
